description_long: This is a small, weathered cafe building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a stone and concrete facade and a flat, aged roof. The front displays a prominent sign reading 'Café De Luz' above large glass windows and a double-door entrance, flanked by striped awnings. To the right, a wooden pergola structure covers an outdoor seating area with several tables and chairs, partially enclosed by slatted wood. The roof is topped with two large, rusted industrial ventilation ducts, adding an industrial touch to the otherwise rustic exterior. The building sits on a paved stone base surrounded by patches of grass, and the overall appearance suggests a blend of utilitarian and cozy urban design. The materials and weathering indicate a long-standing establishment, likely popular in a neighborhood setting.
description: A weathered stone and concrete cafe with a flat roof, large front windows, striped awnings, and a wooden pergola covering an outdoor seating area. Prominent signage and rusted ventilation ducts give it a rustic, industrial charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Café De Luz' sign, glass entrance, striped awnings, and the outdoor seating area under a wooden pergola.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the full extent of the pergola and outdoor seating, with the cafe's side wall and part of the roof visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, the large rusted ventilation ducts, and the edge of the pergola structure.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the stone facade, large windows, and the industrial ventilation system on the roof.
